text:
Created attachment 238588
py-extract-msg-0.38.4.patch

Description:

ChangeLog: https://github.com/TeamMsgExtractor/msg-extractor/blob/v0.38.4/CHANGELOG.md

* Fix line in OleWriter that was causing exporting to fail.
* Fixed some issues with the README.

QA:

* portlint:
  - WARN: Makefile: using hyphen in PORTNAME. consider using PKGNAMEPREFIX and/or PKGNAMESUFFIX.
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.1-RELEASE, amd64)
